title: Shall 3-Piece Adjustable Wrench Set, 10/8/6 Inch Cr-V Steel Wrench with Cushion Grip,Navy Blue, Laser-Etched for Home, Garage, Workshop and DIY
features: 【Set Includes】- Comes with 3 pieces of adjustable wrenches in sizes 6” 8” and 10”, which covers most of your needs. This kit is ideal for basic home use such as automotive maintenance and repair, plumbing and general assembly tasks.

【Robust Build Quality】 - Constructed of high-quality chrome vanadium steel, heat-treated and drop-forged process for superior durability and toughness. The black oxidized finish features anti-rust and corrosion-resistant functions to prolong its service life.

【Wide Jaw Design】- The wide jaw design allows the user to use the adjustable wrench more efficiently. 6" wrench max opening is 15/16"(23.8mm), 8" max opening 1-1/8"(28.6mm) and 10" max opening 1-3/8".(35mm)
【Laser-Etched Scale】- Each wrench is laser-etched with a precise SAE scale, with high-grade mirror polishing treatment, allowing users to read the scale size more clearly and conveniently.

【Flexible Worm Gear】- With its non-slip knurled design, the smooth adjustment worm gear of the wrench quickly adjusts the jaw without jamming and hand injury. More precise slots with smaller gap ensure stays on the exact scale after adjustment.

【Comfortable Handle】- The adjustable wrenchs feature a comfortable cushioned grip allowing to put real strength into a turn without worrying about sore hands. Hook hole at the end of the wrench to hang on a hook or tie it in an easy-to-reach place.
description: Product Description Ergonomic Soft Dipped Grip Easy and Precise Adjustment of Opening Size
